title: Trading Tournaments to be Terminated effective November 1st, 2017
text-1: This letter is to inform you that as of November 1st, 2017, IQ Option will no longer be offering access to Trading Tournaments for clients residing in the European Union.
text-2: This decision was made promptly in response to a request made by the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission − the regulatory agency that licenses IQ Option’s operation in Europe.
text-3:
No tournament that started prior to November 1st, 2017 shall be affected by this decision.
Please, update your reviews and promos accordingly.
sorry: We apologize for any inconveniences caused.
